mentions.note: Medtech premium now eviscerated: down $133→$87 YTD, trades 16x earnings with 4–6% organic growth. Case study in overvaluation of ex-growth stalwarts; capital rotation to data center winners.
Medical device sector weakness affects Abbott as well. Cohort too hard to own currently.
Alternative to GE Healthcare for medical device exposure; reports next week, so wait for earnings to consider entry.
Pharma company; pharma exposure for diversified portfolio; solid dividend name.
Stock down 20% YTD after weak quarter and baby formula lawsuit but should not be at 52-week lows; needs couple reasons on earnings call to justify recovery; reports Thursday.
Down 34% YTD after missing quarter despite being one of greatest American companies; market shows zero mercy for non-data-center exposure.
Bought Exact Sciences but uncertain fit; wait to see how integration plays out before recommending given complexity of combining diagnostics with pharma.
